/usr/bin/c++ -O3 -DNDEBUG -arch arm64 -dynamiclib -Wl,-headerpad_max_install_names -compatibility_version 1.17.0 -current_version 1.17.0 -o ../../bin/libspdlog.1.17.0.dylib -install_name @rpath/libspdlog.1.17.dylib CMakeFiles/spdlog.dir/src/spdlog.cpp.o CMakeFiles/spdlog.dir/src/stdout_sinks.cpp.o CMakeFiles/spdlog.dir/src/color_sinks.cpp.o CMakeFiles/spdlog.dir/src/file_sinks.cpp.o CMakeFiles/spdlog.dir/src/async.cpp.o CMakeFiles/spdlog.dir/src/cfg.cpp.o  -Wl,-rpath,/Users/mac/lhm/build_check/bin ../../bin/libfmt.12.2.0.dylib
